\tzpentry{ID3893}{Inverse Temperature Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3893 introduces Inverse Temperature Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \beta(\lambda_g) = \mu \frac{\partial \lambda_g}{\partial \mu} = -\epsilon \lambda_g + \frac{\lambda_g^3}{16\pi^2} - \frac{5\lambda_g^5}{256\pi^4} + \mathcal{O}(\lambda_g^7) \end{equation}
